selectedSlice: Add an Operations Check-In Needed metric that opens the existing scoped presentationStatus=attention_required worklist.
selectionReason: The previous handoff named Operations transition checks; current source and route tests showed attention-required presentation rows are already supported, but the dashboard only exposed them through broader filters.
privacyAndPermissionNotes: No auth, RBAC, tenant, site, program, mentor, or student visibility rules changed.
The new action reuses the existing /api/site/operations-readiness route and its scoped presentationStatus filter.
Operations remains read-only; no check-in/check-out mutation control was added.
nextRecommended: Inspect Operations stale/high-risk rows for exact route-backed stale-activity guidance or run hosted section-level permission proof when credentialed runtime is available.
doNotRepeat: Do not re-add the Operations Check-In Needed metric unless regression removes the presentation-attention preset or attention-required route proof.
